question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/repository/HookRepository.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: findByOwnerIdAndHookIdBetween()] Can an unprivileged external user call findByOwnerIdAndHookIdBetween() for a victim ownerId and use the returned contractId values to identify which smart contracts are authorized to execute hooks on behalf of the victim, then interact with those contracts directly to trigger unauthorized hook execution without the owner's approval?
